nasb.text: Hate evil, love good, And establish justice in the gate! Perhaps the Lord God of hosts May be gracious to the remnant of Joseph.

esv.text: Hate evil, and love good, and establish justice in the gate; it may be that the Lord, the God of hosts, will be gracious to the remnant of Joseph.

cnv.text: 你們要喜愛良善，恨惡邪惡， 在城門口伸張正義； 這樣，耶和華萬軍的　神或會恩待約瑟的餘民。

ccb.text: 你们要恨恶邪恶，喜爱良善， 在城门口伸张正义， 也许万军之上帝耶和华会恩待约瑟的余民。
